content:
# Niger Delta

**Summary**: A major sedimentary basin in West Africa.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] conducted the study within the niger-delta to evaluate Otu field.

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] focused on crude oils from various fields throughout the Niger Delta region.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] gravity tectonics and listric faults

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] focused on crude oils from various fields throughout the Niger Delta region.

## Formations Present

- [[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015]] Akata, Agbada, Benin

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Niger Delta is a clastic wedge 12 km thick with an area of 75,000 km2. ([[2015-sanuade|Sanuade, 2015, p. 21]])

- The majority of these [oil] reserves are found along the country's coastal Niger River Delta. ([[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005, p. 19]])
